channel.title: Prerak Trivedi - Blog
channel.description: Writing about AI products, voice interfaces, growth, and building from zero.

item.title: The AI Product Manager's Survival Guide
item.description: What I've learned shipping AI products at scale and why most AI PMs get it wrong.

item.title: The Experimentation Framework That Actually Works
item.description: How I built an A/B testing platform that 10+ teams actually use and the mistakes that almost killed it.

item.title: The $5M Build vs Buy Decision: A Framework for When Vendors Fail You
item.description: How I killed a vendor contract and built an enterprise AI platform in-house and the framework I wish I had before wasting three months on evaluations.

item.title: From 0 to 2.5M Users: What Nobody Tells You About Scale
item.description: The hard part isn't technical. It's getting 10 teams to agree on what success means.

item.title: Why I Build Platforms, Not Features
item.description: The difference between solving one problem and solving categories of problems.

item.title: I Evaluated 8+ Voice AI Vendors. Here's How I Would Decide What to Build vs Buy.
item.description: A practical breakdown of what to look for when choosing voice AI infrastructure for production applications.

item.title: You Think You're Shipping a Product? You're Actually Operating a Platform.
item.description: The hard part isn't building the thing. It's noticing when it becomes the place where other work starts living.

item.title: Personalization Didn't Get Creepy. It Lost Its Boundaries.
item.description: Why AI-powered personalization fails quietly and why that failure is a product decision, not a technical one.

item.title: When AI Fails, It's Rarely Because the Model Was Wrong
item.description: Why the next bottleneck in AI adoption is decision boundaries, not accuracy.

item.title: When AI Stops Assisting and Starts Deciding
item.description: How everyday helpful systems quietly take on judgment, and why most teams notice too late.

item.title: Building a Product Vision: The Blueprint to Long-Term Success
item.description: How to create a product vision that actually guides decisions.

item.title: Duolingo's Growth: Product Management Lessons You Can Steal
item.description: What product managers can learn from Duolingo's growth playbook.

item.title: AI's Green Dilemma: Innovation at What Cost?
item.description: Exploring the dual nature of AI in a sustainable world.

item.title: Machine Learning IS for Everyone
item.description: Breaking down the barriers to entry in machine learning.

item.title: Skills Needed to Be a Data Scientist
item.description: A practical guide to the skills that actually matter in data science.
